**Medical Assessment and Rating Board for Indian System of Medicine**

**National Commission for Indian System of Medicine, New Delhi**

**Assessment Report of Unani Postgraduate Departments for the Academic Session 2026-27**

**File no. 3-4/MARB/2025-Un-PG.(04)**

**Dated:-GOLDEN**

It is submitted that **National PG Institute of Unani Medicine, Hyderabad, Telangana (Inst. ID-PGUNA001)** was visited on **2026-06-14 and 2026-06-15** to assess the available facilities of Postgraduate teaching and training for **Annual visitation for issuance of Annual permission with intake capacity of 6 seats in PG (Unani) course for the academic session 2026-27 under section 28/29 of NCISM Act, 2020** by the visitors namely:-

| **S. No.** | **Visitor’s Name** | **Visitor ID** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Dr. Mohd Farhan | V06210 |
| 2 | Dr. Ayesha Khan | V06255 |

Further, after examination of the visitation report along with all the annexures, the following compliance/shortcomings have been observed against MESAR (PG) Unani 2024:-

**Infrastructure:**
1. Postgraduate teaching department area — Postgraduate teaching department area is 25 sq.mt. against the requirement of 25 sq.mt. - fulfilling.
2. Postgraduate seminar hall — A Postgraduate seminar hall (ICT-enabled) is available.

**Library & Digital Library:**
3. Digital library computer systems for PG (1:5) — Digital library has 2 PG computer systems against the requirement of 2 (1 per 5 PG students).

**Biometric Attendance (AEBAS):**
4. Aadhaar Enabled Biometric Attendance System (AEBAS) — Aadhaar Enabled Biometric Attendance System is implemented and functional.

**College Website:**
5. College website — Functional

**Hospital & Departmental Functionality:**
6. Additional IPD beds for the PG department (1:4 per PG seat) — Additional PG-department IPD beds are 24 against the requirement of 24 (4 per PG seat).
7. Departmental average bed occupancy — Average bed occupancy is 59% against the minimum requirement of 60% - not fulfilling.

**Postgraduate guides / teaching staff:-** Postgraduate guide / teaching staff details could not be determined from the visitation report - manual verification required.

**Non-teaching staff:-** Non-teaching staff details could not be determined from the visitation report - manual verification required.

**Hospital staff:-** Hospital staff details could not be determined from the visitation report - manual verification required.

**Punitive Action Summary (Punitive Policy 2026-27, approved in the 160th Board Meeting)**

| **Deficiency** | **Consequence** | **Seats** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Departmental average bed occupancy: 1.67% deficiency | Seat reduction | 1 |

Cumulative seat reduction of **1 seats** (16.67% of the sanctioned intake of 6).
